SessionStart.command: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main || echo 'Rebase failed -- resolve conflicts before continuing'
SessionStart.description: Sync current branch with latest main on session start

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo '--- Branch divergence from main ---' && git diff --stat origin/main...HEAD 2>/dev/null; fi
PreToolUse.description: Show divergence from main before any git push
